/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libautoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libautoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/autoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/autoware_msgs/msg/detail/waypoint__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/autoware_msgs/msg/detail/lane__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/autoware_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/autoware_msgs/msg/detail/command__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/starry1n/WUTA/build/autoware_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libautoware_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
